title: Cloud Engineer (Openshift, Cloud, VMware)
description:
• Administer and maintain VMware ESXi hosts and vCenter Server.
  • Manage clusters, resource pools, virtual switches, and datastores.
  • Utilize vSphere technologies including vCenter, ESXi, vMotion, DRS, and HA.
  • Monitor system health dashboards in vCenter; address alerts, failures, and performance degradation.
  • Troubleshoot VM resource bottlenecks (CPU, memory, disk, network).
  • Provide incident resolution and technical support for Windows system-related issues.
  • Conduct performance analysis and tuning for Windows servers.
  • Administer Windows Failover Clusters and Always-On Clusters.
  • Administer and maintain Hyper-V hosts and virtual machines.
  • Configure and manage virtual switches, storage, and failover clustering.
  • Monitor performance and availability of Hyper-V environments
  • Collaborate with storage, networking, and backup teams for integrated infrastructure support.
  • Manage control plane components and worker nodes in OpenShift clusters.
  • Monitor node health and resource usage (CPU, memory, disk).
  • Analyze logs using OpenShift Cluster logs, Splunk, or external logging services.
  • Troubleshoot networking, deployment, and node-level issues in OpenShift.

Key Requirements:

  • Bachelors’ Degree in Computer Science or related field.
  • At least 6 years’ relevant experience.

Skills:

  • Virtual Infrastructure Management VMware,Hyper-v
  • OpenShift Container Platform (OCP)   
  • Hybrid Cloud AWS / Azure

“This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (“e2i”).

e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions. e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions. e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives. By applying for this role, you consent to Quesscorp Singapore’s PDPA and e2i’s PDPA.”

postedCompany.description: Quess Singapore is part of Quess Corporation( www.quesscorp.sg) and is one of the largest staff augmentation firms in Singapore. Quess is ranked 48th Largest Global Staffing supplier by SIA. To be successful, the candidate will have to understand the technical depth of the industry and the company to become and effective talent partner.
